sectorForm.createSectorDescription: Here you can create a new sector. Sectors are larger areas within a crag. In Chironico, for example, Schattental would be a sector. Sectors are further subdivided into areas which usually represent a single block with several lines.
sectorForm.sectorShortDescriptionPlaceho: Information about the sector, in a nutshell...
sectorForm.blocweatherTooltip: To display weather information for this sector on the details page, you can enter the URL for the relevant section on blocweather.com here.
sectorForm.invalidBlocweatherUrl: The URL must follow the format https://blocweather.com/<country>/<region>/<spot>
sectorForm.aPublicSectorWillSetParentsTo: Creating a non-secret sector within a secret crag automatically sets the crag to non-secret, otherwise you cannot navigate to the sector. Other pre-existing sectors remain secret.
sectorForm.openingAClosedSectorWillSetPa: Creating an non-closed sector within a closed crag also automatically sets the crag to non-closed. Other pre-existing sectors remain closed.
